description: Fix all frontend API path mismatches where frontend calls a different URL path than what is registered in the backend routes. Fix the residentTabletApi paths (frontend uses /resident-tablet/ but backend registers /tablet/). Fix benchmarkingApi.getDashboard (frontend calls /benchmarking but backend registers /benchmarking/dashboard). Fix elearningApi.getStaffProgress (frontend calls /elearning/staff/:staffId but backend registers /elearning/progress/:staffId). Fix emarApi.discontinue (frontend uses PATCH /medications/:id/discontinue but backend uses DELETE /medications/:id). Fix diabetesApi.getGlucosePatterns (frontend calls /diabetes/glucose/:residentId/patterns but backend registers /diabetes/patterns/:residentId). Fix palliativeCareApi.administerAnticipatoryMed (frontend calls /palliative/anticipatory-meds/:id/administer but backend registers /palliative/anticipatory-meds/:id without /administer sub-path). Fix benchmarkingApi.getMetricHistory (frontend calls /benchmarking/metric/:name but backend registers /benchmarking/metrics/:name with plural 'metrics').
steps: In frontend/src/services/api.ts residentTabletApi: change '/resident-tablet/requests' to '/tablet/requests' (line 396, 397); change '/resident-tablet/requests/${id}/acknowledge' to '/tablet/requests/${id}' (line 398, backend uses PATCH to acknowledge); change '/resident-tablet/${residentId}/view' to '/tablet/residents/${residentId}' (line 399)

In frontend/src/services/api.ts benchmarkingApi: change getDashboard from '/benchmarking' to '/benchmarking/dashboard' (line 412); change getMetricHistory from '/benchmarking/metric/${metricName}' to '/benchmarking/metrics/${metricName}' (line 414)
In frontend/src/services/api.ts elearningApi: change getStaffProgress from '/elearning/staff/${staffId}' to '/elearning/progress/${staffId}' (line 442)
In frontend/src/services/api.ts emarApi: change discontinue from api.patch(`/medications/${id}/discontinue`, data) to api.delete(`/medications/${id}`) (line 42) -- backend uses DELETE method
In frontend/src/services/api.ts diabetesApi: change getGlucosePatterns from '/diabetes/glucose/${residentId}/patterns' to '/diabetes/patterns/${residentId}' (line 465)

In frontend/src/services/api.ts palliativeCareApi: change administerAnticipatoryMed from '/palliative/anticipatory-meds/${id}/administer' to '/palliative/anticipatory-meds/${id}' (line 478) -- backend does not have /administer sub-path
acceptance_criteria: All frontend API paths match their corresponding backend route registrations
residentTabletApi uses /tablet/ prefix matching backend routes
emarApi.discontinue uses api.delete() matching the DELETE route
Frontend TypeScript compiles cleanly: cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit
Backend TypeScript compiles cleanly: cd backend && npx tsc --noEmit
verification: Run: cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit (should succeed)
Run: cd backend && npx tsc --noEmit (should succeed)
Run: cd frontend && npm run build (should succeed)
Run: cd backend && npm run build (should succeed)
